creator: conrad@th.physik.uni-bonn.de
text:
Currently the zoom mode of enlightenment is disabled when compiled on
alpha, because it hangs enlightenment if used together with the XFree
3.xxx libs.
This doesn't occur if compiled against the XFree 4.xx libs.

Fix: 

Please, if possible, allow zoom mode again, if the XFree4 libs are
installed on the system. Unfortunately I don't know how to to that from 
a makefile.... (sorry..)
